query: SELECT pi.id, pi.playerId, pi.itemId, pi.obtainedAt, i.name as itemName, i.imageUrl as itemImageUrl, i.quality as itemQuality, i.value as itemValue FROM player_items pi LEFT JOIN items i ON pi.itemId = i.id LIMIT 5;
